key.name: platforms
key.description: JSON array of platforms. Each entry: {"name": string, "rules": [{"mode": "contains"|"suffix", "value": string}]}. A platform is considered active when the focused browser window's title (after stripping the browser suffix) matches any rule.

key.name: threshold-minutes
key.description: Continuous active minutes on a platform before Scroll Scold notifies.

key.name: snooze-minutes
key.description: How long the "Snooze" notification button delays the next scold while you stay on the platform.

key.name: grace-seconds
key.description: How long you can be away from a platform before its session timer resets to zero. Shorter absences only pause the timer.

key.name: idle-seconds
key.description: If no keyboard/mouse input for this long, session timers pause.

key.name: mute-alerts
key.description: Suppress notifications and sound; timers keep running.

key.name: play-sound
key.summary: Play a sound with the scold notification

key.name: custom-sound-path
key.summary: Absolute path to a custom sound file

key.name: restrict-to-browsers
key.description: Only count time when the focused window belongs to a known browser (matched against its WM_CLASS / app id). Prevents false positives such as a code editor with "youtube" in a file name.

key.name: browser-wm-classes
key.description: Case-insensitive substrings matched against the focused window's WM_CLASS / app id. Substring matching keeps multi-profile Chrome windows ("google-chrome (Profile 1)") covered.
